programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Lauren (30) has had a rare cancer called myxoid-liposarcoma since she was eight. Can surgery fix it, finally allowing Lauren to get on with her life?

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Car fanatic John has filled every inch of outdoor space at his home with classic cars, but hes decided to part with some of his beloved collection to fund his retirement. And a rare animal pelt could be the solution to inn owner Carolines problems.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in...
programme.desc: Adam Buxton and Joe peruse Pragues wonders as they kayak down the River Vltava, sample sausages out of skulls and caviar-laced ice cream, hop into a beer spa and ascend the Zizkov TV Tower.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: From two first time buyers looking to settle down to a family who have been scarred by a previous purchase, this search challenges Kirstie and Phil in ways they never anticipated. Twenty-seven-year-old Mike Richie and his girlfriend Katy Roberts have recently returned home after ten months globe-trotting and want to put down roots in Leeds. Ann-Marie McCullough and partner Lee Connolly want to leave Leeds.

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and Marj Hogarth continue their quest of turning a 163-year-old chapel into their dream home, wasting no time ripping out the fungus thats infected the place.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Last to host in South Wales is Sandra, whos going heavy on the cream and mushrooms, despite no one really liking them! Could her night be the crème de la crème?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Cleanliness has been the buzz word this week, with pretty much all of the hosts unhappy about their less-than-sparkling scores. Have some of them been playing dirty?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: The season winds down for our Brits abroad, but will Abi and Darrens wedding in Spain, and Andrew and Richards wedding event in France go off without a hitch?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Debra and Gordon search for a holiday home in Torrevieja for £120k. Debras keen on apartments, but Gordon wants a townhouse. Can Laura Hamilton find a compromise?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Ben Hillman catches up with John and Daniel who bought a town house in Cádiz. Jean Johansson visits Kate in Paphos to see how shes getting on in her apartment.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, the first host is 32-year-old mum-of-one Gemma Willock. Gemma loves to look good and enjoys anything thats big, brash and sparkly.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Second host in the West Midlands is mortgage adviser Andrew Devey. When Andrew isnt doing his day job, he would like to be a lover of all things cool and artistic.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its day three of the competition in the West Midlands and the host is vegetarian Jules Evans. When Jules isnt working, she likes spoiling her three dogs, drinking real ale and doing a spot of Morris dancing.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day four of the competition in the West Midlands the host is massage therapist Lucy Hird. Having travelled extensively in Thailand, shes chosen a Thai theme for the evening.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Uri and his wife Hazel are keen to find a permanent home in south west Cyprus, to escape the cold Scottish winters. Can Leah Charles King find the perfect place for their £200k?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil help workers with very modest budgets who want to find their first homes in south London. Civil partners Jo Hendle and Ally Macdonald are planning a family and want to be in their own home before two becomes three.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura and Nick dream of making a permanent move to Estepona on Spains Costa del Sol with their beloved dog Poppy. Can Jean Johansson find the perfect place for their £160,000 budget?

programme.desc: Wildlife biologist Forrest Galante scours the globe using cutting-edge technology on his mission to find species the world has stopped looking for from the Florida Everglades to remote jungles in a search for the truth.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Engine trouble cripples the Integrity; the family competes with the bear neighbours.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.sub-title: Tracy Morgans Giant Shark Tank Revealed!
programme.desc: The pressure is on for Wayde and Brett to convert Tracy Morgans pool house into a shark aquarium.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: For four generations the Kilchers have lived off what their 600-acre homestead in Homer, Alaska, has provided, but cultivating that living is never easy.

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: A bulldozer breakdown sends Jeremy on a high flying cross-country journey. When a wolf stalks Jenny, its woman versus wild as she faces off with the fierce predator.

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: To build out his farmstead, Jeremy must strike a deal with the enemy. Plus, Neil takes on major upgrades as he prepares to sell the town.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: A team of specialists, armed with the latest technology, try to locate the fabled bigfoot. The start of their search takes them to the forests of Oregon.

programme.title: Guddu Ki Gun
programme.desc: A flirtatious salesman finds himself in a quandary when a young womans angry grandfather casts a spell on him after he dumps her. To lift the curse, the young man must find true love and prove he can remain faithful to his new lover.

programme.title: Ek Aur Prem Deewani
programme.desc: After falling in love with her music teacher, a princess wishes to break off her engagement with a US-based man. As a result, her wedding day turns out to be full of unexpected events.

programme.title: Sweekar Kiya Maine
programme.desc: Gopika Sharma is taken to Bombay by her uncle to help her pursue a career in singing, but when he is abducted Gopika and her servant are left alone to fend for themselves.

programme.title: Ram Balram
programme.desc: Jagatpal kills the parents of his nephews, becomes their guardian, and when they grow up, uses them in his deceitful ploys to gain wealth.

programme.title: Johny I Love You
programme.desc: After the death of his wife, former bandit Suraj Singh decides to turn his life around and goes to work in a small hillside community. He takes his son, whom he renames Johny for fear that his old partner will come and search for him - an event which occurs in a most surprising manner.

programme.title: Satya
programme.desc: A young man arrives in Mumbai from South India in search of a job. After being falsely jailed, he meets an underworld boss Bhiku Mhatre and joins his gang. Living in a poor neighbourhood, he also meets the beautiful Vidya. She is not aware of his underworld connections and Satya is soon torn between his girlfriend and his gangster life.

programme.desc: Before dying, a black magic practicer transfers his soul into a doll which finds its way into the hands of Karishma Kapoors brother. The evil doll has plans of his to get into a new body.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: In therapy for paralysis, Mitch meets a courageous 10-year-old witness to murder.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Although still unable to move his legs, Mitch comes to Jasons aid when hit man Riddick attempts to kill him again.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While coaching Matt in kickboxing, Mitch ends up in a match of his own with a vengeful enemy from his Navy days; C.J. becomes a swimsuit model.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When Mitch is the victim of a series of life-threatening "accidents," suspicion points to a visiting lifeguard from Australia.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie (Jeremy Jackson) is in an accident with his mother (Wendie Malick) after she arrives to tell Mitch (David Hasselhoff) shes remarrying and wants custody; Matts (David Charvet) family moves back to France; Jackie and Summer (Susan Anton, Nicole Eggert) open a business.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and his lifeguard team rush to save Hobie, ex-wife Gayle and her fiance after their plane crashes in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Romance prevails when Jackie tries to intensify her relationship with Mitch, Matt and Summer deal with their feelings for each other and Hobie falls in love.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After rekindling her relationship with a former love (John Allen Nelson), C.J. (Pamela Denise Anderson) discovers that he has a serious disease.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: C.J. is pursued by a persistent executive who tries to impress her with his hot-air ballooning skills; Slade returns unexpectedly.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch is kidnapped by a woman who takes him to a fishing boat to treat her wounded husband, an escaped convict.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hostage Mitch performs surgery on an ex-con; an environmental investigator has a near-fatal accident.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch agonizes over the near-drowning of a boy who lies in a coma.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitchs upcoming birthday motivates him to enter an iron-man competition; Matts effectiveness as a lifeguard suffers when he takes a night job.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A murderer threatening to bring harm to some of the lifeguards; Mitch resorts to extraordinary means to bring an end to the situation peacefully.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and the Baywatch lifeguards are asked by gymnast Mary Lou Retton to help organize an athletic competition for developmentally challenged youths.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt is asked for help by a former love, motorcycle racer Jesse Majors, when her bosss romantic interest in her becomes obsessive.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The reunion of an elite group of lifeguards from the 1950s prompts Ben to make a decision about his future at Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch tries to save his brother, who suffers a heart attack after their sailboat capsizes; Summer sees a ghost while staying at a famous San Diego hotel.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie and C.J. search for Mitch and his brother, who are lost at sea; Summer does some research on the ghost that has been appearing to her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An attractive woman and her plain sister vie for Mitchs affections; Matt confronts his fear of sharks.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch dates an investigative reporter whose story about an international government conspiracy has put her life in danger.

programme.desc: The lifeguards help country music star Jessie Lee Harris (guest star Ricky Van Shelton) locate his estranged wife and son (guest stars Kassie Wesley, Brady Bluhm). Martina McBride also guest stars.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: As Mitch deals with budget cuts that could take lifeguards off the beach, Matt and Summer save a young couple from drowning.

programme.desc: Ramsay MacMahon travels to East Lothian for a weekend of high-octane fun and fascinating history. Starting in Dunbar, Ramsay learns about the humble beginnings of John Muir. programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: In the second of this three-part series, Professor Robert Bartlett explores the impact of the Norman Conquest of Britain and Ireland. Bartlett shows how William the Conqueror imposed a new aristocracy, savagely cut down opposition and built scores of castles and cathedrals to intimidate and control. He also commissioned the Domesday Book, the greatest national survey of England that had ever been attempted.

programme.title: St Patricks Day at the BBC
Other Voices 2026: Dingle, Ireland
programme.desc: Other Voices returns to Dingles St James Church as Dermot Kennedy leads a stellar line-up with Amble, Miles Kane, Dry Cleaning and rising new voices in an unforgettable episode.

programme.title: Enya at the BBC
programme.desc: Sail away into the calm with this celebration of Enya, Irelands most successful solo artist. She took the world by storm with her first single, Orinoco Flow, which stayed at the top of the UK charts for three weeks in 1988. Since then, shes released nine albums in the top ten, won multiple awards and has even had a fish named after her. Enya brought New Age music to the masses, all while maintaining her privacy, rarely giving interviews and never touring.

While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Mans role in his fathers death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Forbidden America
programme.desc: As the rise of platforms like OnlyFans give adult performers financial independence away from the studio model of old, Louis encounters a new generation using their online platforms to call out alleged predatory behaviour.

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Six people unwittingly find themselves locked in another series of escape rooms, slowly uncovering what they have in common to survive -- and discovering theyve all played the game before.

programme.title: Doctor Who

With Rorys life in danger, the Doctor and Amy must locate him before it is too late! Luckily, an old friend helps them and guides the way.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctors search for Clara Oswald brings him to modern-day London, where Wi-Fi is everywhere. Humanity lives in a Wi-Fi soup. But something dangerous is lurking in the signals, picking off minds and imprisoning them. As Clara becomes the target of this insidious menace, the Doctor races to save her and the world from an ancient enemy.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison welcome the very first guests to their new bijoux BandB, determined to get a glowing review, whatever the cost. While serving the couple breakfast, Alison realises that they are not enjoying their anniversary break and, fearing a bad review, utilises the surprising skills of Lady Button and Julian to ensure the couple make the most of their weekend away. Mary reveals she has never had a holiday, so Pat tells her about the joys and pitfalls of week on the Costa Del Sol.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mary tells Julian how she finally found her voice, while Thomas decides he must finally kick his Alison addiction. Old friends of Mike share the surprising secret to their success.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes is desperate for a holiday but cant find anyone to look after Grandad. It seems her only option is to convince a Health Inspector that Grandad is losing his marbles.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Everyone in the Brown family has a date for Valentines Day except Agnes. Can she really start internet dating at her age?

programme.title: Man Up
programme.desc: A 34 year old single Nancy is mistaken as Jacks 24 year old blind date. Nancy decides to go along with it and it happens to be the most chaotic yet hilarious journey of her life that neither Jack nor Nancy will ever forget.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: As Janet prepares to leave Jonny she finds a photo taken on the night that they met, becoming a a long musical flashback detailing how Donna, Janet and Louise first met Jonny and Gaz.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet tries to dump Johnny but is upstaged by some pasties, Louise gets revenge on David, and Donna finds the courage to pursue a new dream.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny finds himself a new girlfriend, Gaz challenges David to a drinking contest for Donna, and a book called `Piggy Goes Oink changes Louises life.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny ruins his first date with Kate by trying too hard to be manly, a big hairy spider upsets Louises plan to live with Janet, and Gaz bids to become a pop idol.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet and Gaz get much closer than they had ever intended, and Jonny and Kate find out how biscuits can improve your love life, while Louise applies for a lucrative new job.

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommys recovery is back on track after he and John put his hand to the test. The pair are training again, and the search for Tommys next opponent begins. Eager to make the most of family time, Tommy splashes out on a £90,000 motor home for family trips with Molly and Bambi and takes his mum out for lunch and a long-overdue catch-up.

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Comedy short films from new and established talent. Showcasing original, weird and very funny films.

programme.title: The Walsh Sisters
programme.desc: Five Irish sisters navigate addiction, grief, motherhood, relationships, and the chaos of a family that cant live with or without each other. When a sudden event shakes their world, old wounds resurface, and long-buried secrets come spilling out.

programme.desc: Bisexual mum-of-three Sophie has brought a third person into her marriage to husband Ricki. Now she is scared she will be pushed out. Can they find a way to make this throuple work?

programme.title: The Repair Shop: On the Road
programme.desc: A historic clock at Doncaster School for the Deaf ticks again, a familys 1950s coffee machine is reborn, and Will learns marionette making - an endangered craft.

programme.title: Clive Myries African Adventure

programme.title: Political Thinking with Nick Robinson

programme.title: !mpossible
programme.desc: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Jason Manford hosts the quiz show where players face a question and pick from a board of six rankable answers. Some answers are good, but only one is unbeatable.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: Susan Calman hosts the quiz show where being in control is everything. Who will emerge as the Boss and walk away with the cash? Only the strongest players will survive the game.

programme.title: Weatherman Walking
programme.desc: Derek Brockway takes a hop across the water from Tenby to Caldey Island, which is well-known for its monastery, monks and lavender perfume.

programme.title: Scotland from the Sky
programme.desc: James Crawford reveals how planners and architects took to Scotlands skies after World War II and used the Gods eye view in their mission to redesign towns and cities across the Central Belt. From one of Scotlands first tower blocks, to New Town living, to the building of a motorway that ripped through the heart of Glasgow and the vision to cover it up, James reveals how these utopian and controversial visions have transformed our lives and how were living with the legacy to this day.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Unseen sequences from recent roadshows and recounts stories of the Queen Mothers early life at Glamis Castle. Plus, ivory figures collected by a man nicknamed `Steptoe by his family, a necklace of very ancient stones, and a collection of handbag mirrors.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Paul Martin and experts Mark Stacey and David Fletcher visit the Dorford Centre in Dorchester. A lady brings in the last of her pin cushion doll collection for Davids attention and Paul takes a look at a Royal Doulton Black Jack. The star item of the day is an old globe found by Mark which proves to be a big hit at the auction.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Over 16 years, multiple sightings have been recorded of colourful lights in the skies above Bucks County, Pennsylvania. While initially sceptical, researchers have been forced to admit that something unexplainable is happening. Desperate times call for desperate measures, and our experts speculate that it may be a low-temperature star, Teegardens Star B, that is the source of the mysterious flying objects.

programme.title: Accidental Truth - UFO Revelations
programme.desc: Over many years investigation into government sources and interviews with government insiders, Ron James argues that the presence of another, advanced extraterrestrial intelligence engaging with humanity is being suppressed.

programme.desc: A series of UFO sightings in 1947 propels the phenomenon to the world stage; the U.S. Air Force concludes that UFOs may not be from Earth.

programme.title: Unsealed: Alien Files
programme.desc: In the court of public opinion, the most credible UFO witnesses come from law enforcement.

programme.title: Unsealed: Alien Files
programme.desc: Space Shuttle cameras record UFO footage that many experts find almost impossible to explain.

programme.title: Unsealed: Alien Files
programme.desc: Some UFO sightings take place over large cities and have hundreds of witnesses.

programme.title: Unsealed: Alien Files
programme.desc: Investigating compelling UFO and alien cases by opening previously off-limits secret files.

programme.title: Unsealed: Alien Files
programme.desc: Exploring the idea that aliens may have had a hand in humans technological advancements.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: An out-of-this-world look at ten of the most fascinating alien encounters ever.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Counting down 10 discoveries-breakthroughs that challenge traditional beliefs about human history; from a lost city hidden in the Andes to mysterious metal spheres that are not of this world and a sunken city that is said to be the home of the gods.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Inside the dreaded Alaskan Triangle the location of over 20,000 disappearances over the past 50 years, 4 residents of Yakutat, Alaska have an encounter that they wont soon forget when they get up close and personal with the unexplained in December 2019. The exoplanet LHS 1140 b is used to base our experts theories as to who these visitors may be and what their POV may be like.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: With over 160 different sightings, residents of the Chicago suburb of Tinley Park have gotten used to seeing the unexplained. The phenomena of the Tinley Park Lights has caused many to question what they know as natural occurrences. Using exo-planet TOI-700 d to posit a theory of what these visitors may be looking for and what they are seeing, experts wonder if the UFO doesnt have nefarious aims?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Alien Pilots, Carolina Lights and Stone Cold Animals
programme.desc: Did a man in Turkey capture footage of alien pilots in a UFO cockpit? What are the strange lights repeatedly spotted over Brown Mountain in North Carolina since before the Civil War? Did an Australian man stumble upon an alien corpse on the pavement?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Mystery Sea Beast, the Earth is Alive and Shapeshifting UFO
programme.desc: Tony Harris and his team of experts examine the clues and make a determination about the validity of the supernatural.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: In the white ice of Antarctica, satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects, and when experts discover that its moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomena.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: When a strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything known about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the sight of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of Americas most famous faces.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: An ancient mechanical device found on a 2,000-year-old shipwreck has become known as the worlds first computer. Can modern technology finally unveil what the mysterious Antikythera Mechanism actually is?

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: One of historys most notorious pirates, Blackbeard, is said to have had a treasure worth millions of dollars. After centuries of searching, the legendary hoard remains missing.

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Awe-inspiring and mysterious, the pyramids of Egypt are significant wonders of the ancient world; more than 4,000 years old, they are celebrated architectural marvels, but no one fully understands how they were built, or why.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: When a highly-trained naval radar technician reports an anomaly, none of his superiors are willing to go on the record to back him up. Years later, after decades of ridicule and name calling, the evidence is pilling up and the technician has planted the proof of his experience in the ultimate repository. Kepler-62 f serves as our theoretical home for this baffling aircraft that appears to defy the known laws of physics.

programme.desc: Decades later, new eyewitnesses tell the story and confirm the 1973 alien abduction in Pascagoula, Mississippi.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Odd Squad

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: Doctor Pfooflepfeffers first act as head of governors is to turn Bash Street School into a boarding school. However, the pupils devise a series of daring attempts to escape.

programme.title: Danny and Mick
programme.desc: A special visit from the mayor means that his chains need putting away safely, while he goes for a swim. As head of security, Mick locks them in Joys safe, but due to his forgetfulness, Danny and Mick now need to work out another way to retrieve them before the mayor returns.

programme.title: Hey You What If?
programme.desc: From cloning to 3D printing, explore what would happen if people could make copies of themselves.

programme.title: Bitesize: 5-7 Year Olds

programme.title: Blow Your Mind
programme.desc: Dr Maggie fires lasers at the moon to measure just how far away it is.

programme.title: Out of This World
programme.desc: Dr Maggie reveals that no matter how much you plan, prepare and practise for space travel, things can sometimes go wrong. Dr Maggies star guest is Professor David Southwood CBE.

programme.title: After Life: Rot Box Detectives
programme.desc: A team of young science detectives investigate rot and decay through a series of experiments and activities, assisted by Dr George McGavin.

programme.title: Shark Bites
programme.desc: Steve Backshall encounters the most striking shark of all, the thresher shark. With a tail as long as its body, its a shark with a fantastic physique. Steve dives with two of these stunning sharks off the coast of the Philippines.

programme.title: Operation Ouch! Hospital Takeover
programme.desc: The doctors reveal how amazing saliva is, and they find out why the hospitals maintenance team work with birds of prey in Operation Takeover. In the Emergency Department, Dr Chris finds out how the doctors know who to treat first.

programme.title: Horrible Science
programme.sub-title: Dinosaur Traitors, a Grumpy Moon and a Big Bang
programme.desc: An episode featuring everything from the creation of the number zero to the beginnings of the whole universe. The moon gets lonely, theres an ISS cookery competition, and DI Loofah arrests a banana.

programme.title: Hey You What If?
programme.desc: Venus has acid rain, crushing pressure and is hotter than an oven, so it might not sound like the ideal place to live. However, up in the clouds its almost just like home.

programme.title: Absolute Genius With Dick and Dom
programme.desc: Dick and Dom reveal the genius of Michael Faraday, a pioneer of electricity whose discoveries helped power the planet. Inspired by Faradays genius ideas, Dick and Dom come up with their own genius idea, involving a cage, and almost a million volts of electricity.

programme.title: Absolute Genius With Dick and Dom
programme.desc: Dick and Dom reveal the genius of Alexander Fleming, the man who discovered penicillin. Inspired by Flemings discovery, they come up with their own genius idea, which involves an attempt to turn billions of germs into priceless works of art.

programme.title: Andy And The Band
programme.desc: Odd Sock Theo needs help to save some snails, because Gloria Greedi wants to build a car park space on their home. Andy and the Band come out of their shell to save the day.

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.desc: Nitro and Fury prank Cyclone, who thinks she is filming an animal-theme exercise video dressed as a turtle. The other Gladiators have fun pranking the audience at Sheffield Arena.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: When Kwazii discovers a blue whale with an injured tail, the Octonauts attempt to use a giant net and Octofloats to keep it from sinking. Meanwhile, Peso and Tweak collaborate on a special brace for its tail, and Kwazii, Dashi and Shellington try to find it enough food. But when the supporting net breaks, the Octonauts have to launch an emergency free-fall rescue.

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Dad and Cosima both think theyre the best at pranking. Their prank war quickly spirals out of control, until Big Lizard finally reveals Proximas real pranking champion!

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: The Piris are delighted when the berg hits a tropical island and move into holiday mode. But when their wasteful behaviour annoys the local monkeys, they need to make amends.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: When the heroes are sent on a quest to prevent an ogre from making a mess of the village green, Trevors smart mouth puts them all in danger.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: The heroes quest to find out who is behind a string of cake thefts, but they soon realise that there is more to this mystery than what meets the eye.

programme.title: Ninja Express
programme.desc: Desperate for peace and quiet, an alien leader orders an entertainer to take care of his planets creatures. However, things nearly go wrong when Konpeki brings a giant cake.

programme.title: Malory Towers
programme.desc: Jean reveals Malory history that shocks Lily, while Darrell and Alicia plan a major prank!

programme.title: Bros in Control
programme.desc: Adam and Joe take on a Mesozoic mission when Little Bro Callum challenges them to live as dinosaurs for a day. Find out if they can complete their chores while avoiding the erupting volcano.

programme.desc: Bitzer is left with a mountain of work when the Farmer is rendered incapable. Enter the farmhand who is more interested in his mobile phone than getting the task done. Shaun and the flock ensure that their friend Bitzer gets his own down time.

programme.desc: The heroes quest to keep a two-headed dragon away.

programme.title: Supertato

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Pando is at Bings house today and has an earworm called Bingly Bangly. Bing isnt impressed with this, declaring that he is Bing. When Pando cant resist saying the name, Bing knocks Pandos tower over and wants him to go home. But then Flop suggests they try a Thingly song instead.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops

programme.title: Hey Duggee

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairytale about growing up in a wild place called the 80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.sub-title: Go Jet Academy: Sea Arch Escape
programme.desc: When Xuli tries to beat Ubercorns flying record, she accidentally damages a sea arch that holds up a rock formation. Inspired by Xulis piloting skills, Tala convinces her to show her some tricks in the Grimbler, but disaster strikes when Tala traps herself under the fragile arch. The Go Jetters must race to save the day before the arch collapses.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: After Old Brown snatches her, Cotton-tail gets stuck up a tree. Its up to Peter, Lily and Benjamin to rescue her before either a passing Mr Tod seizes her or the angry Owl returns.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: The Octonauts expand their exploration beyond the sea - and onto land. With new rides and new friends, they are prepared to protect any habitats and animals at risk on land or under the water.

programme.title: Alphablocks

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: Rain is forecast in Fluffytown, but Love Monster is excited because his friends are coming round for an indoor activity day. Theyre going to knit onesies, drink hot chocolate and build a pillow fort!

programme.title: Playtime Towers
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch is busy with the Playtimers making a tasty treat called Munchy Muddy Meadows.

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, its the spectacular music duo Okra playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Sulas cousin Nicky is visiting, something Bing is a little unsure about. Sula and Bing start making rippy pictures, and while Sula is looking for some purple paper Bing shows Nicky how to voosh the blue speedy car down the slide. However, Nicky vooshes too, falling and breaking his glasses! Sula is furious and Bing is forlorn. Amma soothes Bing while Nicky shows him that he can click his glasses back together again.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `juice, and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Theres orange juice, apple juice, tomato juice and sip-it-in-the-heat juice. We drink it as a treat, and we meet a goose drinking juice and a moose drinking juice.

programme.title: Lu and the Bally Bunch

programme.title: Piggy Builders

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: The Twirlywoos visit a school hall. They see a teacher pick up different coloured hoops and set them spinning, so they try to spin hoops themselves.

programme.title: Something Special

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Tummy Tales, a boy learns to knit with purple wool and in Teletubbyland, purple Tinky Winky answers the Tubby Phone and leads the Tubby Phone Dance. Tinky Winky also plays with the Tiddlytubbies.

programme.title: The Baby Club
programme.desc: Nigel and Baby Bear welcome babies Olive, Jack, Arabella, Leo, Emma, Jonas and their grown-ups to The Baby Club. Inside everyones bags in this episode are socks which are explored through discovery, play, song and story. Grown-ups at home are encouraged to take part by hiding baby appropriate socks inside a fabric bag or pillowcase for them to reveal and explore with their baby! The fun song `Head, Shoulders, Knees and Toes features, as does a story involving Baby Bear.

programme.title: I Spy, You Spy
programme.desc: Elsee plays I Spy next to a beautiful lake with her new friend Olivia.

programme.title: I Can Grow It

programme.title: Dylans Playtime Adventures

programme.title: Small Potatoes

programme.title: Vegesaurs

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo have a magic xylophone that can freeze Dad in space and time. However, Dad gains control and freezes Bluey instead.

programme.title: Hey Duggee

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The Game Catchers are five friends who travel through space exploring fantastic planets with one big mission: to discover, play and collect all the games in the universe.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Its Music Time, and Timmy is fascinated playing the xylophone. When Play Time comes, he insists on taking it with him, but drops it and one of the chimes is lost. He tries some crazy alternatives with no luck, until he hears a strange chiming noise coming from Paxton on the see-saw.

programme.title: Our Family
programme.desc: Kyra and Khloe plan a visit to Nana and make chocolate crispy cakes to surprise her with. Visiting Nana is a special occasion, so Mum draws pretty patterns on Kyra and Khloes hands using henna.

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: Aleishas family comes from Uganda. Today, she is cooking the traditional meal of rolex, which is a Ugandan omelette. Aleisha uses tasty fresh vegetables such as baby tomatoes, cabbage, red onion and her special ingredient, mild green chilli.

programme.title: Ferne and Rorys Teeny Tiny Creatures
programme.desc: Freddie finds out all about creatures that live on land and underwater - newts. Chantelle is at a zoo to meet Kira and two very special salamanders while Rory and his son Sandy are at a country park to meet a very special protected newt.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Disability assistance dog Tinks and her owner Charli have a long list of chores to do, all in time for Annabel, their last minute visitor!

programme.title: Go Wild
programme.sub-title: Aneeshwar and Lizzie: Senegal Bushbaby and Dwarf Crocodile
programme.desc: Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet a Senegal bushbaby and dwarf crocodiles.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Mrs Hobbs holds interviews for a cat-sitter for George. Waffle wants the job and the Brooklyn-Bells hatch a plan to help.

programme.title: Puffin Rock
programme.desc: Oona tries to find a place for a noisy little starling to sleep.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: Yukee discovers a little mouse who is lost in the woods. A musical song map may help Frida find her way back home and never get lost again.

programme.title: My Petsaurus
programme.desc: Chloe is practising her recorder for school assembly, when a curious Topsy decides to join in with the music!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out on a walk in the countryside. Its been a long walk and the squirrels are starting to get tired, but home is far away. Dont worry, Duggee has his singing badge.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Yakka Dee! celebrates children communicating - because talking fills you up with whizz, pop, bang! In this episode, Dee encourages a friend to say house and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different houses: a small house, a tall house and a hen house. Theres a lighthouse, a bright house, a bee house and a tree house.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Ahoy there! Join the Seven Times Table as he sails the seven seas in search of the rainbows end. The Seven Times Table is a jolly friend, who brings good luck. Hes very clever, and with Sevens he never gets stuck. He collects his crew as he sings his Seven Times sea shanty.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Its Os birthday, but R has forgotten to get him a present! Can she magic up a big wheel, a helter skelter and a hall of mirrors from thin air?

programme.title: Something Special: Were All Friends
programme.desc: Justin and his friends learn how to boogie board while Mr Tumble plays a game of tennis with Lord Tumble.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Its breakfast time for the children in Tummy Tales and in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies wake up and cant decide whether to have tubby custard or tubby toast, so they have both!

programme.title: Patchwork Pals
programme.desc: The Patchwork Pals have a problem: today is their lazy day, but Patchwork Fly wont let them rest.

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.sub-title: Raa Raa and the Jungle Gym
programme.desc: An overenthusiastic Raa Raa breaks Pias new jungle gym, but he manages to fix it so everyone can have a turn.

programme.title: Chuggington
programme.desc: Wilson has his hands full while babysitting.

programme.title: Gigglebiz
programme.desc: Captain Adorable tries to demonstrate his super mind power to Awesome Girl. Priscilla, the very noisy goose at Nana Knickerbockers panto farm shop, refuses to lay a golden egg for a customer.

programme.title: Graces Amazing Machines
programme.desc: Series for young children that celebrates lots of different amazing machines. In this episode, motorcycle rider Grace shows off three amazing machines that are all built for fun!

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The Game Catchers land on a new planet and learn to play spiders web. Before they can begin, they must help an indecisive Catercoon confidently shed its cocoon!

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: Shellington and the Vegimals mission to replant a mangrove forest is put in peril by a school of toothy barracudas.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Broken Bed
programme.desc: When Peter breaks the bed his father made for him, he finds that fixing it leads to an unexpected adventure.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. His cousins have come to visit.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When Juno the baby hippo gets sticky from tree sap, only a bubble bath will get her unsticky, but the moment she sees Vidas big bathtub, she runs away scared. Vida uses baby hippo steps to get Juno comfortable with the bath, and before she knows it, she loves baths! And shes unsticky.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has set a trap for the Tatocar but gets herself and Corn trapped instead.

programme.title: Weasy Family
programme.desc: Weasy falls in love with a gold watch, but it belongs to the farmer.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Preston needs rescuing from a stuck cable car. When the car suddenly starts moving again, Mojo has to ride the cable to chase it down and save poor Preston.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairytale about growing up in a wild place called the 80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: At a party, Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills, while Nanna cant find a way to make herself useful. Theyre both feeling a bit lost, until they find each other.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Brinicle turns news anchor and invents stories to wow his audience until things go wrong.

programme.title: Andys Safari Adventures
programme.desc: When Mr Hammond tasks Andy with making sure the marine iguanas are clean for their inspection, Andy isnt sure what they need in order to do just that. Jetting off in his Safari Mobile, he heads to the Galapagos Islands in search of the answer.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Evie forgets her reading book, so Waffle takes it to her at school. As Waffle reaches the playground, he sees Evies P.E. Class and is desperate to join in.

programme.title: Rafi the Wishing Wizard
programme.desc: Rafis Fixie Pixie wish causes chaos, until she realises honesty is the best fix.

programme.title: JoJo and Gran Gran
programme.sub-title: Winter: Its Time to Mix Colours
programme.desc: JoJo is painting a picture of St Lucia when she runs out of green paint. Gran Gran doesnt have any more green, but she does have yellow and blue. Its time for a Gran Gran plan!

programme.title: Sarah and Duck
programme.desc: Duck has some competition for Sarahs attention when a brand new toy arrives.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: Small gives Tiny a lovely sparkly bag which he has caught when fishing in space. It is perfect for Tinys panpipes. But when she goes to get her panpipes out of the bag, she is amazed to find it speaks, in sounds and shapes.

programme.title: Beddybyes
programme.desc: BaBa becomes friends with a Tweetie - a BaBa Tweetie. MeMo would like a Tweetie friend too, so at Play Time, MeMo befriends a new toy, MeMo Dog. MeMo loves playing with MeMo Dog, while BaBa enjoys playing with BaBa Tweetie. MeMo takes MeMo Dog to Yummy Time to show the Yummies. Yummy Dog loves MeMo Dog too and takes care of MeMo Dog for MeMo. MeMo lets MeMo Dog stay with Yummy Dog.

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: The Pinky Ponk gets stuck in a tree and tips it up, sliding everyone to the other side. Everybody slides back and forth, tipping the Pinky Ponk the other way.

programme.title: Cbeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: A different story read by a special guest each night just before bedtime.

programme.desc: A look behind the scenes aboard some of the worlds most opulent cruise ships, where suites cost up to £8k a night and pets are as pampered as their people.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker round up and examine the weeks leading and most entertaining news stories via their acerbic wit, discussions and sketches. And each week, guests join them to dissect the weeks events and talking points.

programme.title: Greg Davies: The Back of My Mums Head
programme.desc: Stung by his mothers suggestion that he is not normal, Greg puts everyone else under the microscope in a petty quest to discover if anyone actually is.

programme.title: Bill Baileys Remarkable Guide to the Orchestra
programme.desc: Comedian and classically trained musician, Bill Bailey joins forces with the brilliantly versatile BBC Concert Orchestra and musical maestro Anne Dudley.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Bridgeport, Connecticut to visit Cafe Tavolini, a restaurant that is more than just a culinary disaster. Run by a husband and wife team, the restaurant is being neglected as they teeter on the edge of divorce.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Dunsandles Guest House in New Brighton, Merseyside, owner Alan Johnson and his best mate and professional sidekick Dave Owen hope to be crowned best value BandB of the week.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: This visit is to the Lady Teal Hotel Boat on the waterways near Burnley in Lancashire, owned by Nick and Gina Mead.The afternoon entertainment is some freezing competition out on the locks.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the competition is to York House in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, where Brock Burgius hopes his cheeky sense of humour and perfectionist nature will help him win the competition.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition is at Heyford House in Lower Heyford, Oxfordshire. The afternoon event is boxing, which Brock sees as a perfect opportunity to settle some scores with Dave and Alan.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers meet for the last time to thrash out their differences and find out whos won. Feedback includes criticism of a badly positioned tea tray, a hot chocolate storm, and accusations of over-enthusiastic hosting.

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: The next room for transformation is the Victorian-inspired parlour bathroom. For their black bathroom, Keith and Marj take inspiration from Coventry Cathedral. Keith makes a clay candlestick holder, while Marj sets about making her dream lampshade.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete to host the best dinner party in Essex, in a week featuring deep-fried jam sandwiches and some attention-grabbing burlesque.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: A hurricane destroys the backyards of the Hefferenans and the Sackskys. Carrie doesnt like the idea of a combined backyard, but their neighbours have other plans.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug is pressured into getting his cousin a job but doesnt want him working at IPS. Meanwhile, Arthur fills out audience comment cards on a new movie.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Incredible Lightness of Being a Baby
programme.desc: Marge wont let Maggie play with her new baby crush because of his annoying mother, leading Maggie into a depressive spiral. Mr. Burns tasks Homer with swindling Cletus out of his helium fortune.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a new superhero film before its release, and realises he can use his plot-spoiling powers for his own ends.

The truth is Jane and the neighbour, Paul, have been having an affair for many years.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rachels Phone Number
programme.desc: Rachel impulsively gives a handsome restaurant patron her telephone number, and worries that hell call when Ross is in their apartment. Meanwhile, Phoebes boyfriend Mike and Ross desperately try to find something in common to talk about when they babysit Emma, and Chandler returns from Tulsa to visit Monica, but must hide from Joey after rejecting his offer of free basketball tickets.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Goes Back to Work
programme.desc: When Rachel returns to her office to show off baby Emma, she is surprised to find handsome temp Gavin has been doing her job while she has been away on maternity leave. Their immediate war of wills prompts Rachel to make a rash decision.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.desc: In the Pacific Northwest, Jared Douglas and his logging crew risk life and limb to harvest some of the planets most remote and valuable trees. But getting these giants from the forest to market is deadly.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Josh Gates and his team investigate the realms beyond the unknown.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil tracks what could be an unknown species, while Jess hunts for evidence that a legendary creature is nearby.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Jess and Phil venture into the deadly waters around Andros Island to investigate the suspected presence of a sea monster. What they find turns out to be far more shocking.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: A murderous monster is said to lurk in the vast swamplands near New Orleans. Phil and Jess investigate an ancient Cajun mystery surrounding a bloodthirsty werewolf-like beast terrorising the Bayou.

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: Phil and Jess travel to Monterrey, Mexico, where locals tell of encounters with witches and black magic. Upon investigating these stories, they find evidence of dark spells, blood rituals and animal sacrifice.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: Jared moves into an abandoned logging camp, placing a $250,000 bet on a remote, dangerous site that will either sink or save his business. Ross is charged with moving the float camp ten miles deeper into the wilderness.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: In the Pacific Northwest, Jared Douglas and his logging crew risk life and limb to harvest some of the planets most remote and valuable trees. But getting these giants from the forest to market is deadly.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: In the logging world, big wood equals big money; its a tough job for the crews logging and transporting the biggest, most valuable timber on Earth.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: In an all-out push to turn a profit at Grizzly Camp, Jared enlists Dave to navigate $200,000 of wood down the deadly Grizzly River. Fallers Chris and Jeff tackle steep terrain in search of big wood.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.sub-title: If You Cant Stand the Heat
programme.desc: As fire season draws closer and threatens widespread shutdowns, Jareds feeling the heat -- he races to salvage logs before its too late. At Grizzly River, fallers Jim and Rob are called in to help clear a path to one last stand of money trees.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: With fire season looming, Jared is under the gun to get all his product out of the woods before it turns to ash. Fallers race to drop trees without sparking a backcountry blaze and an alarming discovery at float camp could sink the whole operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Scrapyard Dynasty
programme.desc: Terry Walker runs a successful scrapyard in Bolton. With help from his family and staff, he tries to find his next money-making scheme alongside running his business.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s island cabin with major rot issues. With a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project, will the team be able to transform the cabin while maintaining all of the original rustic charm?

programme.title: Ed Staffords Rite of Passage
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Ed must wrestle the giant heirs of Genghis Khan to become a man. He takes part in the annual rite of passage festival, Naadam.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates hunts for the truth behind the worlds most iconic and fascinating legends. Leaving no stone unturned, Joshs adventures take him around the globe and into dangerous situations as he dives in to uncover the truth behind enduring mysteries.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Did MKUltras mind-control experiments spiral beyond the agencys grasp? Was Cleopatras death truly by her own hand, or a political assassination disguised as legend? Where did a painting worth $160 million disappear to without a trace?

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: Desperate to discover who is surveilling them, Mark and Digger set a trap. Tim and Howard attempt a new path to recreating the familys high-proof elixir recipe. When Big Chuk arrives in Franklin County unexpectedly, Tickle and Henry have concerns.

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: In the season finale, Mark and Digger scramble to clear evidence of outlaw activity -- only to discover the law is one step ahead.

programme.title: Moonshiners
programme.desc: Tim rejoins Tickle on the outlaw side as Canadian tariffs open a new market; with police on their trail, Mark and Digger revive old-time tactics; Josh heads to the Carolina hills to reinvent his family recipe with a new ingredient.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Are moons the most likely place to find life beyond the Earth? Explore the 300 that lie within our solar system which might give an idea of the Earths turbulent past.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing
programme.desc: In 2014, Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 vanished without a trace. Did it crash and if so, why cant the wreckage be found?

programme.desc: Josh Gates journeys across the American Midwest in search of the legendary golden loot of Jesse James. Along the way, Josh debunks Jesse James myths, rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mt, and treasure hunts into Buzzards Roost.

programme.desc: Henry and Sam are in Worcestershire, meeting farmer Adrian. They find a shed full of bikes that arent really Sams cup of tea. However, Sams mood changes when they come across a four-wheeled delight out in a field.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam are in North Yorkshire with Paul, a lover of Triumph motorcycles. Unfortunately, it seems that many of the bikes are out of their price range, until they find something lurking in the dark corner of the shed.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam set off down to Rays shop to sell a bike, but while there, they discover that Ray has plenty for the boys to rummage around in. They have a wonderful day, but come away with less than they want.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: The deal-searching duo are near Preston at Grahams place. They discover that Graham is also keen on military gear and Americana. In the end, though, Henry and Sam come away with something a little unusual and decide to put it to the test.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: Every defect with the Mercedes Gul-Wing has finally been addressed, but questions and challenges remain. Now they must to see if the client will pick Kevin or Daves vision.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: A car doesnt always need to be totally rebuilt. Dave swaps the chassis and upgrade performance for a 1955 Nomad to give the car the edge it was missing.

programme.title: Mysterious Creatures With Forrest Galante
programme.desc: Forrest Galante and his team scour the globe to investigate mysterious creatures at the heart of deadly animal/human conflicts. After solving each mystery, Forrest focuses on resolving the conflict, often saving human and animal lives in the process.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Scott steps up to challenge Mike for the Captains spot, but all Skipper Andy sees is his deck start to disintegrate.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Captain Phil sadly loses his battle for life while the fleet are out battling a massive storm, but once they find out they celebrate his life - crabber style.

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: According to a legend that dates back to the 16th century, a cache of Incan gold worth hundreds of millions of dollars is hidden off the coast of southeastern Brazil. Its known as the `Treasure of the Trinity, and its eluded all who have sought it for 500 years. But a modern-day team of explorers follows a radical new theory to uncover its whereabouts: a remote, treacherous island where thousands of deadly vipers roam. Cork Graham leads the expedition to Queimada Grande - known to locals as Snake Island - armed with advanced technology to unearth complex clues and decipher puzzles that have protected the treasure for centuries. This Discovery series takes viewers along on the epic journey to one of the most dangerous places on Earth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh travels to Japans remote Yonaguni Island to explore an underwater phenomenon described as Japans Atlantis. Josh dives into the waters of the Pacific Rim to explore this remarkable site.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh pursues lost fragments of the True Cross of Jesus Christ. He visits the Holy Land to trace the whereabouts of wood from the crucifixion, until new evidence leads him to the underside of the ancient city of Istanbul.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Marty takes on a risky first-time build: a huge diverter trench to deflect the torrents of storm water devastating the homestead of musician Lou and his wife, Stacey. With a huge storm forecast, no one can predict if this rescue will succeed.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is jealous of Barrys performance when they both get jobs at Spencers; Murray insists that Adam get a job, but Beverly thinks he should focus on filmmaking.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When a talent agent tells Adam hes only suitable for `nerd roles, Beverly makes it her mission to turn him into a heartthrob. Barry decides to embrace a punk lifestyle, and Murrays attempt to get more involved in Ericas life backfires.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and the other Adam Goldberg have a karate match to settle once and for all a long-running feud. Erica and Geoffs relationship goes public.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Jai wed Leanne, whos scared of heights, 100 feet in the air in 2016. Now its his turn to squirm as he sits down with his bride and her dad to relive their nuptials.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The guys share their biggest fears when they crash Jays annual hiking trip. Back home, the girls get their DIY on as they build Haleys new nursery.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil feels emasculated when Bill wows Dylan and Luke with heroic tales. He gets them over for some male bonding, but it goes rather wrong.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: A short clip from Rude Tubes naughty little sister Rude-ish Tube, featuring food and animals.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Los Angeles to visit La Frite - a family-owned French restaurant being run into the ground by Andre Ramillion, his son and daughter Celine and Alex, and head chef Martine.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is terrified when he and his friends are recruited to the school baseball team. Geoffs father interferes in his relationship with Erica.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica and Valley Erica find a new band member to replace Lainey. Adam and Murray plot to escape from Valentines Day dinner with Beverly.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs company puts her up at a new luxury apartment building with a number of high-profile residents that the family is eager to take advantage of. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil visits his dad after he hears some worrying news. Meanwhile, Jay takes Claire and Mitch on a stroll down memory lane.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in the Waverly Hills school district after Springfield Elementary is voted as the worst school in the state. Bart quickly establishes a new bad boy image in attempt to impress his new fellow students. He also tells everyone that Lisa and pop star Alaska Nebraska are best friends in order to boost her popularity. Meanwhile, Homer enjoys the bachelor lifestyle in their new Waverly Hills abode.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: The female members of the Simpson household make a trip to a nail salon and discuss whether a woman can be successful without a man at her side. Marge and Lisa each tell their own parodies of 4 classical stories, including Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An outbreak of food poisoning at Krustys restaurant chain is traced back to tainted barley in nearby Ogdenville, settled years earlier by Norwegian immigrants. Ogdenville Barley Mills is promptly shut down and Springfield finds itself swamped by the unemployed.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Pasadena, California to visit a Jamaican restaurant called Cafe Kingston. There, Gordon finds Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works as a radiotherapist in a clinic next door to the restaurant. She is determined to use hospital techniques in her kitchen and is constantly sealing everything into plastic bags. Dr Morris is as stubborn as she is proud. Can Gordon help?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Eagle Rock California, to visit Capri - a restaurant in a rut - owned by overgrown identical twins, Jim and Jeff. The twins could have walked straight out of Alice in Wonderland and their method of running a restaurant is just as fantastic. Half comedy act half cry-babies, Jim and Jeff seem oblivious to the grime and dust riddling their restaurant.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned opens a Christian amusement park, but is disappointed when the tame religious attractions prove unpopular, but then visitors start to have visions.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons win a holiday but Homer refuses to pay the airport tax and decides the family should travel by goods train. On the train, they meet a hobo who regales them with his own versions of classic American tales, starring the Simpsons as, among others, Paul Bunyan, Connie Appleseed and Tom Sawyer.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay reluctantly takes Phil on a model-airplane excursion, and Gloria goes shopping with Alex. Meanwhile, Claire and Manny get to know one another as siblings.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Mitchells mother, Dede, pays a surprise visit wanting to make up for the trouble she caused at Jay and Glorias wedding. No one is eager to see her.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: During the Christmas holiday, Marge attempts to muster the wherewithal to kick down-on-his-luck Gil out of the Simpson house.

programme.desc: Evergreen Terrace is overrun with traffic and Moe has a fateful choice to make.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: One couple are smitten on honeymoon. Another are very much not. And two new couples get hitched, including flashy English groom Danny.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steven J. Cloobeck goes back undercover, this time focusing on properties that Diamond Resorts International acquired from the bankrupted Pacific Monarch Resorts.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steve Greenbaum is the co-founder and CEO of PostNet, a company that helps small businesses with everything they need to thrive, from printing and delivery to graphic design. Steve goes undercover in his own organisation.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Blackpool, practising Buddhist Antonio and former redcoat Jason serve sushi, theres an eyebrow-raising discovery at fireman Daz and Kims place, and foodies Martin and Kate serve Thai.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host in Swindon are fashion-conscious Carla and Hayley, who serve up a Caribbean-themed menu. They are followed by self-confessed food snob Jeanette and her husband Rob, and day three sees Tim and Kath hosting their very first dinner party.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Daniel and Vanessa have outgrown their starter home, and with a baby on the way, they have just two months to find a larger home in the same area.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: The One with the Party Boy Groom
programme.desc: What happens when the groom is left to plan the wedding day? Reluctant Lee devises Las Vegas-style nuptials, but its not the family church in Norfolk that his bride Anna had in mind.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: The One with the Groom Hunt
programme.desc: Yorkshire groom Lee and his brother take off on a week-long tour of Europe and invite Mr Bean to the big day. Also, they tell bride-to-be Becky that if she wants to marry Lee, she has to find him first.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steven Newman, CEO of Loehmanns department stores, goes undercover posing as an aspiring entrepreneur in a reality TV contest who is trying to win money to start up his own firm.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jane Grote Abell, chairwoman of Donatos Pizza and daughter of the companys founder, goes undercover posing as a contestant on a reality TV show who is trying to win money to open up her own restaurant.

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon visits Meson de Mesilla, a Tuscan-style hotel in Las Cruces, New Mexico.

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon checks in to the Monticello Hotel in Longview, Washington, which is owned by Phillip Lovingfoss. Hes a wealthy individual with a fleet of classic cars, an array of diamond rings and an apparent drinking problem.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The duo help a single mum, her daughter and her granddaughter find a property that is big enough to fit three generations of women under one roof.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.desc: After a tense night out, a bucket of chicken really turns things around; Dr. Tiffany Moon and husband Daniel come aboard with their friends, hoping for a five-star experience; Keith and Danni struggle to get in sync.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies delivers angry appraisals from his comfy throne, as Ed Gamble dons a babys bonnet, Katy Wix makes Alex Horne wince and Rose Matafeo does a spot of screaming.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a brand new episode, as Sean Lock and Phil Wang take on guest captain Alan Carr and Harriet Kemsley. Plus special guests David ODoherty and Joe Wilkinson.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a brand new episode, as Sean Lock and Richard Ayoade take on Jon Richardson and Jessica Knappett. Plus special guests Alex Horne and the Horne Section.

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Dads bought a grotty caravan. Jims got a new dog. And the boys have new `females, but they are unsure whether they should tell mum.

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Dads obsessed with retrieving a plastic bag from a tree. Jonnys sense of style is out of this world. And Adam discovers hell hath no fury like his Mum scorned.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: The pop-up parlour gets a visit from drag queen Devon, who feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, whose portrait of her daughter is more than a little spooky.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, Gillian and her husband Steve kick things off with a simple menu. Day two sees Holly and her boyfriend Richard lay on a vegetarian meal, and on the final night expectations are high for self-professed foodies Jen and Alex.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back Daniel fancies a Caribbean street parade for his nuptials, while Sabrina dreams of a more traditional event. Will their big day be carnage or carnival?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty queen and bride-to-be Yasmin has her heart set on a fairytale wedding. Will body builder Yiannis deliver her dream nuptials?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Maria is a perfectionist, placing her dream of a country house wedding in the hands of her fiance Sam. However, Sam loves a good prank.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Mummys boy Tiago plans to put his self-conscious bride Karlette on the big screen at his 1950s drive-in wedding, but she wants something intimate and contemporary.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adrenaline junkie Mark wants to fly high and take to the sky on his big day, but his straight-talking bride-to-be Lynsey wants more personal, no-nonsense nuptials.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Mitchell Modell is the CEO of Modells Sporting Goods, Americas oldest family-owned company selling athletics footwear, clothing and sporting equipment. He goes undercover within his company here.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Kat Cole, the President of Cinnabon Incorporated, which serves sweet treats from over 900 bakeries in 40 countries around the world, goes undercover among her own workforce.

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon checks in to the Monticello Hotel in Longview, Washington, which is owned by Phillip Lovingfoss. Hes a wealthy individual with a fleet of classic cars, an array of diamond rings and an apparent drinking problem.

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon visits Applegate, Oregon, to try to rescue the Applegate River Lodge, which is around a million dollars in debt. Gordon questions Applegate owner Richard Davis interest in smoking cannabis.

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon visits Starkville, Mississippi, to try to rescue the failing Hotel Chester. Despite having over 40 years experience in the hotel business, owner David Mollendor is at a loss about how to make his dream of owning his own hotel work.

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon visits West Dover in Vermont to try to save a dog-friendly hotel thats desperately in need of help. Sandy MacDougall, the owner, runs the Four Seasons Inn.

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks into Murphys Historic Hotel near Sacramento in northern California, where owners Brian, Kevin and Joel are often too distracted by the party going on in the rowdy bar to look after their hotel.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, Susie Dent and Rachel Riley host the battle of numbers, letters and laughs. Roisin Conaty and Phil Wang play Joe Wilkinson and Lou Sanders. With David ODoherty.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host the comedy quiz mash-up. Bob Mortimer and Tom Allen take on Richard Ayoade and Harriet Dyer. With Ian Smith and Joe Wilkinson.

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Limboland
programme.desc: Limboland is a place where we find the gaps in life. From a fantastically downbeat version of Happy Birthday - via a hilarious tale of a disastrous family trip to see the Northern Lights - to a heart-rending country and western ballad on the nature of love, Bill explores our expectations of happiness with his trademark wit and musicality.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: While house-sitting, Bernard and Manny manage to drink several expensive bottles of wine. Meanwhile, Frans date is a disaster.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Manny is mistaken for a police officer after he chases a bagsnatcher, and Bernard is snubbed after a dinner party.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: A compilation of the highlights from the series. Jimmy Carr oversees the disputes and deliberations, and presents team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson and a multitude of celebrity guests.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: `8 Out of 10 Cats is all pomp and ceremony as it celebrates the Queens Diamond Jubilee in its own inimitable style. As always Jimmy Carr hosts alongside regular team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, plus guests Chris Kamara and Jennie Bond.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: While house-sitting, Bernard and Manny manage to drink several expensive bottles of wine. Meanwhile, Frans date is a disaster.

programme.title: Gogglebox
