programme.desc: The world-renowned cellist and conductor showcases 30 of the best musicians, from cellists and organists to composers and trumpeters.

programme.title: Battle Of The Irish Dancers
programme.desc: A Fresh Start: Dedicated dancers and their teachers, we shine a light on this amazing art form, which requires the strength, endurance and agility of an Olympian. (1 of 3)

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the Academy Award-winning director, whose films include `The Godfather franchise and `Apocalypse Now.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A glimpse into the life and hugely successful career of Academy Award-winning actress and activist, Susan Sarandon.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A tough lady gets her comeuppance when she plans an evil joke at the expense of a nice young couple.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Mike will bet on anything - even his daughters hand in marriage - that no-one can name the rare wine he has found. He cannot lose, can he?

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: SUsing a haunted house in their ploy, two men (Ralph Clanton, John Irving) scheme to con a wealthy American (Biff McGuire) out of his money.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A garrulous baby sitter (Thelma Ritter) enjoys being the center of attention after her employer is murdered.

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From The Vaults
programme.desc: Elbow frontman Guy Garvey lifts the lid on two decades of TV gold. Here, he takes you through 1976, reflecting on the years defining musical performances.

programme.title: John Lennon and Yoko Ono: Above Us Only Sky
programme.desc: Telling the untold story of John Lennons 1971 album `Imagine, exploring the creative collaboration between Lennon and Yoko Ono and featuring interviews and never-seen-before footage.

programme.title: How The Beatles Changed the World
programme.desc: The fascinating story of the cultural, social, spiritual and musical revolution ignited by the Beatles.

programme.title: Elton John: Million Dollar Piano
programme.desc: Elton John plays 18 hits spanning his momentous career on Yamahas incredible Million-dollar piano. Spectacular show from the Colosseum at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Elton John: Million Dollar Piano
programme.desc: Elton John plays 18 hits spanning his momentous career on Yamahas incredible Million-dollar piano. Spectacular show from the Colosseum at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America
programme.desc: A Chinese amnesiac and his companions confront cowboys and Indians in the American West.

programme.title: Blood for Dust
programme.desc: Travelling salesman Cliff is drowning under the weight of providing for his family and finds himself on a dangerous path after a chance encounter with a colleague who has a dark past. Desperate to keep his fragile home life intact, Cliff agrees to partner with Ricky and run cocaine across Montana.

programme.title: Project A 2
programme.desc: Dragon is now transferred to be the police head of Sai Wan district, and has to contend with a gangster kingpin, anti-Manchu revolutionaries, some runaway pirates, Manchu Loyalists and a corrupt police superintendent.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A widowed farmer, with a brave but brutal military past, decides not to join up when the British arrive in 1776. However, when his son enlists and is later captured by the enemy, the former soldier must abandon his new-found pacifist principles in order to rescue his oldest child, and forms a regiment of Carolina patriots, whose guerrilla tactics prove pivotal to the US war effort.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
programme.desc: The Good is Blondie, a wandering gunman with a strong personal sense of honour; the Bad is Angel Eyes, a sadistic hit man who always hits his mark; and the Ugly is Tuco, a Mexican bandit whos always only looking out for himself. Against the backdrop of the Civil War, they search for a fortune in gold buried in a graveyard. Each knows only a portion of the golds exact location, so they must work together.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: On a remote island, a wealthy entrepreneur creates a theme park featuring living dinosaurs drawn from prehistoric DNA. Before opening the attraction to the public, he invites a top palaeontologist, palaeobotanist, mathematician/theorist, and his two eager grandchildren to experience the park. Their park visit is anything but tranquil as the parks security system breaks down, and the prehistoric creatures break out.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her bosss office, she has an `accident, falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batmans efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Sequel in which the entrepreneur who genetically engineered the dinosaurs in Jurassic Park transpires to have cloned more of the prehistoric monsters on another island location. Researchers arrive to observe the creatures in their natural habitat, but hot on their heels is a band of mercenaries intent on capturing the dinosaurs and transporting them back to San Diego Zoo.

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee the Autobot finds refuge in a junkyard in a small California beach town. When 17-year-old Charlie revives him, she quickly learns that this is no ordinary yellow Volkswagen.

programme.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
programme.desc: The Good is Blondie, a wandering gunman with a strong personal sense of honour; the Bad is Angel Eyes, a sadistic hit man who always hits his mark; and the Ugly is Tuco, a Mexican bandit whos always only looking out for himself. Against the backdrop of the Civil War, they search for a fortune in gold buried in a graveyard. Each knows only a portion of the golds exact location, so they must work together.

Against the backdrop of the Civil War, they search for a fortune in gold buried in a graveyard. Each knows only a portion of the golds exact location, so they must work together.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: Straight Outta Nowhere: Scooby-Doo Meets Courage the Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo and the Gang find themselves in the middle of Nowhere, Kansas, the backwoods hometown of Courage and his owners, Muriel and Eustace Bagge.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: This is the story of a ten-year-old boy named Lucas Nickle, who has just moved to a new neighbourhood, has no friends, and is the target for the local bully and his gang. His parents are leaving for a honeymoon in Puerto Vallarta, so they are too busy to attend to his problems. His sister is distracted by her cellular phone, and the grandmother is obsessed with UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A wildly imaginative seven-year-old boy discovers that his new brother, Boss Baby, is actually a spy on a secret mission, and only he can help thwart a dastardly plot that involves an epic battle between puppies and babies.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog and Superman are inseparable best friends, now Krypto must convince a ragtag group of animals to master their own newfound powers to help him save Superman and the rest of the Justice League.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens
programme.desc: When an evil alien attacks the Earth, a motley crew of monsters is called into action to save the world from imminent destruction. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: An ordinary chameleon, Rango, winds up in the town of Dirt, a lawless outpost in the Wild West in need of a new sheriff.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Angelo, an aspiring explorer, is left behind by his distracted parents at a rest stop. He then ventures into a forest inhabited by strange, wonderful creatures to find them.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy businessman, Zsa-zsa Korda appoints his only daughter, a nun, as sole heir to his estate. As Korda embarks on a new enterprise, they soon become the target of scheming tycoons, foreign terrorists, and determined assassins.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Daddys Home 2
programme.desc: Brad and Dustys respective fathers show up to turn Christmastime upside down.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: The wife of a dentist convinces him to betray their new neighbour - a hit man turned informant - to the Chicago gangsters who want him dead. In need of money in order to hurry through a divorce, the young man arranges a meeting with the Mob in which he will exchange information for cash, but when his scheming wife tells the hit man what he is up to, it is the dentists life that is placed in grave danger.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Ben Whittaker, a retired widower in his 70s becomes senior intern at a fashion based e-commerce company. Jules Ostin, the founder, while first hesitant, soon learns to respect and even like her new intern despite their age difference.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: A special agent recruits former models Derek Zoolander and Hansel to save the worlds most beautiful people from a deadly plot.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: When Christina and Courtney take their romantically disillusioned roommate Jane on a night out, Christina meets Peter and falls hopelessly in love with him. However, having missed her chance with Peter on that particular evening, the trio embark on a hilarious road trip in search of Mr Right.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Marmee is the head of the March household in the absence of her husband, whos away fighting in the US Civil War. Her daughters range from the headstrong Jo and sweet Beth, to domesticated Meg and wilful Amy. The film follows the trials and tribulations of the girls, from early poverty and tragedy to Jos later efforts to secure both a husband and a successful writing career, and Amys relationship with an old family friend.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: While widow Aurora fends off a stream of admirers, daughter Emma learns the hard facts of married life.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: The story of Brian Cloughs 44 day stint as manager of Leeds United Football Club. England, in 1974. When Don Revie quits Leeds to become the England boss, the outspoken Brian Clough takes charge. Determined to impose his own style upon Revies tough tackling team, Clough soon alienates his players and the board. Based on the book by David Pearce.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heartwarming tale in which a ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy
programme.desc: A precocious child who hopes to be a writer lands in hot water with her classmates after her secret notebook is stolen.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Spy Kids 3: Game Over
programme.desc: The Spy Kids set off on their third adventure. Secret Agent Carmen finds herself trapped in a 3-D virtual reality video game designed by their new arch nemesis, the Toymaker. Juni must save his sister, as they battle it out against lifelike 3-D monsters, completing each progressively harder level and ultimately trying to save the youth of the world.

programme.title: The Witches
programme.desc: Creepy fairy tale following the fortunes of a young orphan who becomes embroiled in a supernatural adventure. Brought up on his kindly grandmothers scary stories about witches, he stumbles on a real coven while on holiday. Overhearing their plans to capture all the children in Britain, he sets out to stop them, remaining undeterred throughout - even when he has been turned into a mouse.

programme.title: Tom and Jerry: Cowboy Up!
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are in the Wild West where they help save a ranch from the hands of a greedy villain. The rivals team up to help a cowgirl and her brother save their homestead from a greedy land-grabber.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccups friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A heart-warming tale about a troubled young boy and his friendship with a captive orca whale named Willy. On bad terms with his new foster parents and set to work in an aquarium under court order, the boy turns to the whale for companionship. When he uncovers a cruel plot by its owner to kill the whale in order to claim a big insurance payout, the lad becomes determined to save Willys life and release him back into the wild.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: Engaging family tale based on Dick King-Smiths classic story about an orphaned piglet which is adopted by a sheepdog and learns how to herd sheep. Babe at first seems destined to end up on the dining table at Christmas, but the farmer realises that the animals unusual talent may bring him glory in the sheepdog trials.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heartwarming tale in which a ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: A teen suffers the pain of adolescence as she longs for Mr. Right while fending off the advances of the class clown.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wifes infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: A teen suffers the pain of adolescence as she longs for Mr. Right while fending off the advances of the class clown.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: A thirtysomething slacker attempts to inject some stability into his life by adopting an impressionable five-year-old.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Believing it essential before they go to college, four teenage boys vow to lose their virginity and enter into a pact, each attempting to be the first to do the deed as their efforts are met with varying levels of success and failure.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other peoples weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, hes about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: Risky Business
programme.desc: A normally well-behaved teenager goes wild while his parents are out of town. In charge at his parents smart house, the 17-year-old sees the chance to make a fast buck when the prostitute, on the run from a scary pimp, appears at his door. He takes her in, and, following his schools entrepreneurial teachings, lets her turn the house into a brothel.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Zany horror spoof about a brilliant brain surgeon who falls in love with a female brain stored in a jar. The brain is part of an impressive collection held by a colleague in Austria and, upon learning of his wifes infidelity, the surgeon allows himself to be charmed. Communicating telepathically with one of the specimens in the laboratory, he falls in love - but needs a body to put it in.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: Ace assassin Arthur Bishop becomes a target when he agrees to teach reckless Steve the art of contract killing.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective is contracted to recover a stolen nuclear warhead. Hired by both the CIA and Russian intelligence, the kung-fu cop is harassed, assaulted and framed for murder as he delves into the murky world of international arms dealing.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: The cynical commander of Allied Nations forces has to prevent a warlord from taking over the world. With 63 hostages held in his seemingly impregnable fortress, the warlord is demanding an outrageously hefty ransom.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In a desolate near future, vicious motorcycle gangs roam the wastelands attacking what is left of civilisation. With law and order in chaos, a tough police patrolman enforces a new kind of law - cold-blooded revenge - when his family is murdered by one of the gangs.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity, and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater threat. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to recruit a team to stand against this newly-awakened enemy. Despite the formation of an unprecedented league of heroes in Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash, it may be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: One mans brutal campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after its revealed hes a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as Beekeepers.

programme.desc: In Rio de Janeiro, ex-con Dom Torretto and ex-cop Brian OConner join forces against a corrupt businessman who wants them both dead.

programme.title: Blade

programme.title: Vendetta
programme.desc: When his daughter is brutally murdered and legal justice looks unlikely, William Duncan takes the law into his own hands, setting out on a quest for retribution.

programme.desc: In the 1990s, an undercover officer is told to entrap and apprehend gay men only to find himself drawn to one of his targets.

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist. Its up to Falcon, a petty thief raccoon, and Rex, a righteous police-dog, to save the animals on this high-speed runway train.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: When siblings Megan and Noah uncover a long-buried corpse in their parents basement, they stumble into a wildly escalating spiral of crime, cover-ups and murder. The deeper they dig, the harder it becomes to escape.

programme.desc: Skilled operatives travel to an island research facility to secure life-saving DNA from dinosaurs. As the top-secret mission becomes more and more dangerous, they soon make a sinister, shocking discovery thats been hidden from the world for decades.

programme.title: The Running Man

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Sick
programme.desc: While quarantining at her familys lake house during the pandemic, Parker and her best friend are threatened by an unexpected visitor.

programme.title: Timestalker
programme.desc: Hapless Agnes repeatedly falls for the wrong guy, dies a grim death, and is reincarnated a century later. As she experiences romantic misfortune through different eras of history, Agnes seeks to avoid repeat mistakes and finally break the cycle.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk

programme.desc: A British reporter meets female robot Friendship, who has been sent from another planet to war-torn 1970 Jordan.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Out of Darkness
programme.desc: A desperate band of early humans finds a new land to settle in some 45,000 years ago. As they start to realise that something monstrous is hunting them down, they must confront a horrifying danger that they never could have imagined.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Blade: Trinity
programme.desc: The half-human/half-vampire comic book hero springs into action for the third time. A resurrected Dracula plans a fanged armageddon, but Blade takes the upper hand by joining forces with the Nightstalkers, a team of gung-ho demon-hunters.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Acclaimed futuristic chiller about two strait-laced businessmen who go to a theme park in which robots help them live out the adventures of their dreams. While taking part in a Wild West-style saloon shoot-out, one of the robots malfunctions, retaliating in high-noon fashion. Suddenly the men find their lives are in grave danger as they are stalked by a cowboy robot who will stop at nothing to eliminate them.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Live Die Repeat: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A soldier who was killed in action gets caught up in a time loop, in which he repeatedly relives his last battle. However, the more times he fights, the closer he gets to discovering how to defeat the alien enemy.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Shining
programme.desc: Frustrated writer Jack Torrance takes a job as the winter caretaker at the ominous, mountain-locked Overlook Hotel so that he can write in peace. When he arrives there with his wife and son, they learn that the previous caretaker had gone mad. Slowly Jack becomes possessed by the evil, demonic presence in the hotel.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Arrival

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: A famous actress calls upon medical science for help when her daughter begins behaving strangely, but without any success. Then, as bizarre and horrific incidents involving the daughter increase, her mother turns in desperation to the Church, and to a priest who doubts his own faith.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Smile 2

programme.title: Pet Sematary

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: When a familys pet cat is called, they manage to resurrect the animal by placing it in an Indian burial ground which, it is believed, can revive the dead, although in doing so they create a monster.

programme.title: Promising Young Woman
programme.desc: Nothing in Cassies life is what it appears to be, shes wickedly smart, tantalisingly cunning, and shes living a secret double life by night. Now, an unexpected encounter is about to give Cassie a chance to right the wrongs from the past.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A gutsy prisoner earns the admiration of inmates and the wrath of guards by constant defiance and bids for freedom.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows
programme.desc: The murder of Austrias crown prince leads Holmes, Watson and a Gypsy to a showdown with an evil genius named Moriarty.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: In England 2027, worldwide infertility has left the population on the brink of extinction and all hope of a cure is lost. However, underground activist Julian shows up with a miraculously pregnant girl.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: In England 2027, worldwide infertility has left the population on the brink of extinction and all hope of a cure is lost. However, underground activist Julian shows up with a miraculously pregnant girl.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: A group of explorers make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Dom Cobb is is an absolute pro at stealing ideas from peoples minds during the dream state but now he is being challenged to perform the reverse: plant an idea in the mind of a target. The ultimate in corporate espionage, and much is at stake if Dom cant pull it off.

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange
programme.desc: In an England of the future, Alex de Large is the leader of a gang of droogs whose pastime is violence, sex and murder, but whose eventual punishment is almost as extreme and violent as his crimes. Betrayed by the other members of his gang, he is arrested and offered an experimental treatment in order to shorten his sentence.

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange
programme.desc: In an England of the future, Alex de Large is the leader of a gang of droogs whose pastime is violence, sex and murder, but whose eventual punishment is almost as extreme and violent as his crimes. Betrayed by the other members of his gang, he is arrested and offered an experimental treatment in order to shorten his sentence.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter and a band of unlikely heroes pursue a brutal killer, they find themselves in a deadly no-mans-land known as the Thicket.

programme.title: The Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: Ali meets a mysterious man who claims to be the father of her teenage daughter, Katie. What begins as an unsettling encounter soon spirals into a nightmare of long-buried secrets, lies and obsession.

programme.title: Maggie Moore(s)
programme.desc: Police Chief Sanders unravels a web of small-town lies while investigating the bizarre murders of two women with the same name. He meets and quickly falls for Rita, a nosy neighbour whos eager to help solve the mystery.

programme.title: The Cinema List: British Women
programme.desc: The Cinema List spotlights trailblazing British women directors, from `Mamma Mia! to `Promising Young Woman, celebrating female filmmaking talent.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Richard Kembles wife is murdered and he is arrested for the crime. He soon realises he has been framed, and while being transported on a prison bus, he manages to escape. On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Seafaring drama based on the true story of a commercial fishing boat crew who become caught in a terrifying storm off the coast of Massachusetts. In the autumn of 1991, a fishing boat captain is determined to set sail despite the adverse weather conditions, but when the ice machine breaks down his decision to brave the storm rather than lose his catch results in a battle against 100ft waves.

programme.title: RocknRolla
programme.desc: Small-time crooks One Two and Mumbles decide to legitimately invest in some prime real estate and find themselves out of their depth and in debt to old-school London gangster Lenny Cole. Cole himself is in the middle of a business deal with a Russian gangster, but when his accountant tips off One Two and Mumbles to the details of an upcoming big-money business transaction, the two scallywags swoop in and steal the cash.

programme.title: Eye in the Sky

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A disturbed undercover cop recovering from his wifes death is teamed up with a detective with a stable family background to crack an underground drug ring. programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Psychotic LA cop Martin Riggs and his long-suffering partner Roger Murtaugh are assigned to guard an embezzling accountant due to testify before a federal commission. At first, they think it a routine piece of work, but they soon discover that their charge has been laundering money for the same South African narcotics syndicate they have been trying to crack.

programme.title: The Krays

programme.title: Tickety Toc

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Pufferty is too big to have fun at the FunFair, so the twins decide he can be the Roller Coaster. When McCoggins attaches a booster pack, the pup speeds out of control!

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Madame Au Lait is called away to give Chikidee her ping pong lesson, Tommy and Tallulah bake a massive sticky carroty cake on their own. Ignoring the recipe, they make so much mixture that the oven explodes when they try to cook it, showering the whole town with sticky gunk and bringing Pufferty to a standstill! The race is on to free him before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are having fun helping their friends, but dont stop first to ask what their friends need. So Lopsiloo finds herself on the wrong side of the bridge, the wrong goods are served in Battersbys shop and Puffertys favourite ball is thrown out when they tidy his kennel. It is only when they take McCogginss scooter away for cleaning that they finally realise the error of their ways.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Madame Au Lait is cleaning the clockhouse so Tommy and Tallulah take their jammy sandwiches to their room to eat. When some jam gets splodged on a blanket, they dont want to upset Madame Au Lait so they clean it themselves, but when they hang it out to dry on Pufferty, it floats off and lands in a muddy puddle! Whatever will Madame Au Lait say.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Chikidee is making slow but steady progress learning to fly, so Tommy and Tallulah try to help by making her a gigantic paper aeroplane. They dont realise, until its too late, that Chikidee cant control it and has no idea how to land! Chime Time is imminent but they cant leave their friend adrift in the sky. How can they talk her down safely?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah offer to do the polishing so that Madame Au Lait can make their favourite fruity trifle. While she is out buying the ingredients, the twins go polish crazy, thinking that the more they use the happier Madame Au Lait will be and the more trifle she will make. The clockhouse is gleaming when Madame Au Lait returns, but when she sets a hoof on the floor she finds that it as slippery as an ice rink.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are asked to collect McCogginss bell for a town performance. Despite Battersbys warning that the clapper is fragile and doesnt have a spare, Tommy and Tallulah manage to break it. Deciding that they must make a replacement, they look everywhere for something to use and try some very unusual options. Will the bell be ready for Chime Time?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Doris Precious Things
programme.desc: Doris is determined to build the biggest collection of interesting things in Africa, but she upsets the other animals when she takes things that they need.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Leopoldo the Llama
programme.desc: Leopoldo is fed up at always having to play everybody elses choice of games. He decides to climb a mountain on his own as nobody else wants to come with him. Everyone soon realised that perhaps it is more fun doing things with your friends after all.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Zed The Hero of Africa
programme.desc: The volcano is threatening to erupt but the animals are reluctant to leave their beautiful savannah home. Can anybody come to the rescue?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the End of the Rainy Season
programme.desc: It is the end of the rainy season and Patsy the porcupine will soon be arriving to tidy up the savannah. The animals are busy having a clearout, except for Herbert the warthog who cannot bring himself to throw anything away. When he cannot find his musical rocks for the concert that night he is encouraged by Doris the duck to have a clearout.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Flamingo Festival
programme.desc: Pauline the pelican is looking forward to the Flamingo Festival on Waterlily Lake and excited to hear that Isobel is this years Flamingo Queen. She loves to watch the flamingoes practising their dance, and secretly copies their moves. When Isobel hurts herself, everybody is worried that the Flamingo Festival will have to be cancelled. That is, until a surprising understudy steps in to take Isobels place.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Whale Trip
programme.desc: The puffins of Mossy Bay are excited to be going on a whale trip with Hercule Moustache. Hercule points out all manner of sights and sounds as they ride on Thelma the whale, but the boisterous puffins dont always listen to Hercule, and frequently interrupt the poor walrus. The puffins soon learn how important it is to listen to your elders when out on a trip.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.desc: Joey the kangaroo and his friend love playing boomerang ball together. However when their mums fall out they are no longer allowed to play with each other. Can the friends work together to reconcile their mums so that they can play again?

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are organising McCogginss pile of interesting junk when a vitally important spring goes missing. They cant chime the time without it! programme.title: Attack and Defend
programme.desc: Indisputable apex predators and unassuming-but-lethal prey wage war in natures daily battle royal for the right to live another day. From carnivorous cheetahs, polar bears and sharks to exploding blast ants, vomiting fulmar birds and slime-excreting hagfish, those who attack and those who defend have developed specialized skills in their ongoing struggle to survive. programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Philip and Connor secretly open an anomaly within the ARC, only to be invaded by a mass of scurrying future-beetles, which forces the base into lockdown. The team must race against time to save the day before Philip threatens to end the threat by incinerating the building.

programme.title: Wynonna Earp
programme.desc: Big feelings and bigger decisions are revealed when a new witch makes herself known in Purgatory.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, Derek Acorah and the team visit the Guild Hall in Leicester, which has had many uses over the years - including a police headquarters, a town hall and a school - and as a result is haunted by a wide range of spirits.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit the Greengate Brewery, whose reported paranormal happenings include a woman sitting at the boardroom table, a security guard who had his face slapped when he was alone in the building, barrels moving on their own in the cellar and a dark menacing figure in the attic.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The `Most Haunted team visit one of the North Wests oldest theatres, which was the scene of a young actors tragic death. Thought to still roam there, will he or any other principal players from the buildings past choose tonight to make their presence known?

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The `Most Haunted team find themselves isolated in Pleasley Valley Mills, a vast void that is synonymous with tragedy and death. With so many victims from its industrial past, who will choose to show their displeasure as the crew roam the mills eerie and empty corridors?

programme.title: Primeval
programme.sub-title: The End of the Future: Part 1
programme.desc: The ARC team are run ragged by increasing numbers of anomalies. As reports flood in of more anomalies and even of a T-Rex loose on the streets, the group struggle to keep up. Meanwhile, Matt realises that his secret mission is coming to a climax and races to the machine to switch it off. When Philip escapes Connors custody, the clock is ticking for the team to stop him.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.sub-title: The End of the Future: Part 2
programme.desc: Faced with the increasing dangers of Philips machine, the team are pitted against their darkest challenge yet as Matts prediction appears to be true. As they fight to save Connors life, the ARC is also put under threat by the onslaught of an army of future predators. The situation worsens, the stakes are high, and lives are lost as the dangerous world of anomalies comes to its climax.

programme.desc: Allied and Nazi weapons during World War II.

programme.title: Great Tank Battles of World War II
programme.desc: The development, both technologically and strategically from the Fuller 1919 philosophy through the German attack on Poland.

programme.title: Battle for the Skies: History of the RAF
programme.desc: Exploring the modern era of the RAF with the aircraft, C130 Hercules. This vehicle proved its capabilities in countless environments from resupply, to dropping paratroopers and was essential for maintaining dominance of the skies.

programme.title: The Nazis: A Warning From History
programme.desc: Unearthing the shocking truth about how a cultured nation at the heart of Europe allowed a monster like Hitler to come to power. This film reveals how the Nazi party was born, and how, by January 1933, Germany voted for a Chancellor who was openly committed to overthrowing democracy.

programme.title: Inside the Titanic
programme.desc: An ambitious factual drama that reveals moment by moment exactly how the Titanic sank, telling the untold stories of the engineers and stokers who battled the icy water.

programme.title: Weapons of World War II
programme.desc: With attacks on both Pearl Harbor and Sydney Harbour, midget submarines played their part in some of the most gripping stories of the war.

programme.title: Where Were You?
programme.desc: There are some news events that change the world. In todays episode we look at the events of September 11th 2001.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War
programme.desc: As war reaches a critical turning point, German soldiers face the harsh climate of the Eastern Front as well as the full-force of the Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Messerschmitt at War
programme.desc: A documentary charting the history and development of the famous German fighter aircraft, the Messerschmitt BF109. This small, nimble and quick plane was the backbone of the Luftwaffe with over 43,000 being built during the Second World War.

programme.title: Secrets of WW2
programme.desc: From the embarrassment of surrender, the French Resistance developed over the course of WWII into an effective and brave fighting force. They played a key role in the liberation of France.

programme.title: Upstairs, Downstairs

programme.desc: Alex has caught a hospital infection, and knows that the doctors in 2008 are losing hope for her. A wedge develops between Alex and Gene that threatens to rip the whole team apart, and their relationship is put to its toughest test yet in a heart-stopping showdown.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien has an ulterior motive for inviting Tracey to a posh do, and Sharon earns some real money of her own by flogging some pirate Rolling Stone tour t-shirts for Stan the Spiv.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: In Which Howard Gets Double Booked
programme.desc: Howard has to find a way to be in two places at once when he discovers that hes supposed to be taking Pearl and Marina out to dinner at the same time, on the same day.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will the Nearest Alien Please Come In
programme.desc: Science-fiction addict Kevin believes aliens from outer space may have landed. Truly, Clegg and Alvin help to convince him that he is right.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Elegy for Small Creature and Clandestine Trackbike
programme.desc: Howard finds that his new bike is difficult to conceal from Pearl. With a friend like Clegg, however, all his worries are multiplied.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Browns divine inspiration is called upon when Kembleford comes under threat of an alien invasion.

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Catherines search for Tommy gains momentum when she receives a tip-off regarding his whereabouts, and Helen absorbs the shock of hearing that Ann has been abducted.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Pullman is forced to reinvestigate a case which has always haunted her. Nancy Murray, a suburban housewife with a seemingly perfect life, lost control of her car and plunged through a restaurant window, dying instantly. As the team start to uncover the shocking secrets that Nancy was hiding, it soon becomes clear that her death was due to more than dangerous driving.

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: When theres a fatal accident in a carpet warehouse, the youngest daughter of a carpet king hires Frank and Lu to investigate her own sisters.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: The duo investigate when the beautiful and deaf daughter of a Cambridge lecturer is found murdered. A post-mortem reveals that she was pregnant, and a picture is built up of a promiscuous young girl who had a wide range of admirers. It also becomes apparent that jealousy could have a bearing on the case.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries

programme.title: Three Up, Two Down

programme.title: Three Up, Two Down

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Sitting on the east coast of Jersey, and about 14 miles from the coast of Normandy, the small village of Gorey was, for hundreds of years the frontline of defence between the British Isles and its enemy, the French. Archaeologist Ben Robinson follows the story of this small villages history as an important military location, from the castle built in the 1200s to the experiences of the village in the second world war when occupied by Hitlers army.

programme.title: Yes, Prime Minister

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Sir Hallam Holland and his beautiful wife Lady Agnes inherit a dilapidated 165 Eaton Place, and set about restoring the house to its full glory. Former housemaid Rose Buck finds herself back in the house where she was happiest, but the arrival of an unwelcome guest puts a strain on relations, both upstairs and down.

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: With no sign of a thaw in relations between Lady Agnes and Maud, Hallam finds his diplomatic skills put to the test at home as well as at work. Elsewhere, the servants are intrigued by a mysterious new addition to the household, while a restless Lady Persie embarks on a dangerous flirtation, and is drawn to the thrill of radical politics.

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Sir Hallam finds himself at the centre of a national crisis when his friend, the Duke of Kent, asks for help. Meanwhile, storm clouds are gathering within 165 Eaton Place, with Lady Agness growing fear over the imminent arrival of her baby, and the servants concern for Lotte, who refuses to speak. However, as the king finally abdicates, Hallam makes a discovery that will change his life forever.

programme.desc: In this Children in Need special, the DIY SOS team joins forces with Radio 2 for a mega build in Leeds. This is one of the shows biggest projects ever and its a massive challenge to complete in just ten days.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY team head to Dumfries in Scotland to meet Sue, whose partner Barry died of a sudden heart attack in 2003, leaving her suffering from depression, dealing with two young children and living in a house that was falling apart. The team enlist the aid of their very own tartan army to tackle this build and try to help get this family back on track.

programme.desc: The team helps a biker critically injured in a crash. In Brontë country, a man vanishes after going for a swim in a Pennines lake, sparking a major rescue operation.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A dangerous driver in a pick-up truck causes carnage when his vehicle rolls over and the HART team are called to free him and his passenger from the wreckage.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A hitman linked to a drugs gang guns down two men in a supermarket car park. Later, a teenage dare leads to a massive rescue operation after a boy vanishes in the water.

programme.title: Nurses on the Ward
programme.desc: Previous Ep. Next Ep. Matron Steph trials a system to see patients quicker in ED, Sister Renee supports a young woman with anorexia and Nurse Practitioner Rhona cares for Raymond, a patient with suspected sepsis.

programme.title: Nurses on the Ward
programme.desc: Caroline treats stroke patient Maureen, Nurse Consultant Sarah helps terminally ill cancer patient Siobhan get her pain under control and Midwives Amy and Katie deliver a perfect birth.

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Nan visits an old friend in hospital and leaves him a gift, Lauren takes a job at Billys Burger Bar, and Geordie Georgie organises a fundraiser for battered husbands.

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: 1950s landlady Ma Willow makes an appearance, the perpetually unbovvered Lauren competes with Kelly for Ryans favour, and Nan has a mouse in the house. Special guests include Jools Holland and popular beat combo The Divine Comedy.

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Bernies family comes in for a visit, Derek Fay meets Bonnie Langford, and Lauren gets a surprising proposal.

programme.title: Nurses Down Under
programme.desc: The team in Emergency brace themselves for an incoming patient who jumped in front of a moving train. Meanwhile, its Intensive Care Nurse Alis last shift before she moves to Edinburgh.

programme.title: Dangerous Breed: Crime. Cons. Cats.
programme.sub-title: Part 2: The Nine Lives of Teddy Hart
programme.desc: Frederick sways Teddy to return to Canada, where he is arrested; after his arrest, Teddy meets aspiring wrestler Samantha Fiddler and takes her to Florida to train; Teddy returns to Canada for his hearing; Samanthas family questions her whereabouts.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Shooting Joe Exotic
programme.desc: Louis Theroux travels to America to investigate the story of a man who has become one of the most controversial and captivating icons of recent times: the gun-toting, self-described `gay hillbilly and `Tiger King Joe Exotic.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Talking to Anorexia
programme.desc: Louis Theroux spends time in two of Londons biggest adult eating-disorder treatment facilities. He meets women of all ages and at various stages of their illness, and witnesses the power anorexia holds over them.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: With one contestant safe, its time for the others to fight for the final 3 spots in a Dual Duel - where two make a dish with Dijon mustard, and two compete to create an anchovy dish.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics blue light it to a man who had a bad fall and has a suspected spinal injury, while Ash and Craig help a 12-year-old boy who has been attacked at his local fun fair.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.desc: Contestants play a large coin-drop machine, provided they answer questions correctly. Answer incorrectly and the players could be eliminated. The last contestant standing has an opportunity to win the machines £10,000 jackpot.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are here to turn unwanted possessions into hard cash for their owners. In this episode, finds include some baby scales, an oil can and a glass cabinet ready for upcycling.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: In this Children in Need special, the DIY SOS team joins forces with Radio 2 for a mega build in Leeds. Nick Knowles and his team set to work to transform a derelict site into a brand-new base for the young womens charity, Getaway Girls. This is one of the shows biggest projects ever and its a massive challenge to complete in just ten days.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY team head to Dumfries in Scotland to meet Sue, whose partner Barry died of a sudden heart attack in 2003, leaving her suffering from depression, dealing with two young children and living in a house that was falling apart. The team enlist the aid of their very own tartan army to tackle this build and try to help get this family back on track.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Lola the beagle visits Noel after collapsing on her back legs, Brandi the chocolate Labrador refuses to walk, and bulldog puppy Molly is rushed in after being run over by a car.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Ruby the dachshund is rushed in after being run over by a car. Nine-year-old schnauzer Jess is booked in for spinal surgery. Pint-size shih tzu Ted has been injured at home. A CT scan shows that Ted has a broken right humerus.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team travel to a beautiful village in the Welsh countryside to help a widower and his eight-year-old daughter. programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael is in Cushendall, one of the many isolated communities that in times past created their own entertainment, enabling the rise of Irish folklore and supernatural myths.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Bangor, where the beautiful houses facing the sea are a sign of the renaissance that the city has experienced in recent years, thanks in part to its great cultural offer.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael leaves Northern Ireland and crosses the border to the port city of Dundalk, where he visits a family business that sells oysters to restaurants around the world.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael heads to Sandycove, a popular spot for swimmers year-round, and because it was featured in James Joyces celebrated novel Ulysses.

programme.title: How To Build A Motor Car
programme.sub-title: How to Build a London Cab
programme.desc: The classic black cab goes green, as we see how a 21st-century electric London taxi is made, from the aluminium chassis to the all-electric £60,000 eco-cab.

programme.title: How To Build A Motor Car
programme.sub-title: How to Build the Fastest Car
programme.desc: A team of plucky Brits attempt to prove that theyve built the worlds fastest car.

programme.title: How To Build A Motor Car
programme.desc: An access-all-areas look at how the classic Mini is being manufactured for the electric revolution. With unrestricted access to the Mini factory in Oxford, we see the engineering required to create every component that goes into a Mini Electric.

programme.title: How To Build A Motor Car
programme.desc: The historic Jaguar factory in the Midlands opens its doors to show us exactly how the new F-TYPE is built from scratch. From its sleek chassis to an engine that can reach top speeds of 177mph, we follow one F-TYPE on its journey through the factory.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo rolls westwards across the United States. With true frontier spirit he discovers the hidden pleasures of 19th-century railroad workers in Sedalia, and discovers the birthplace of Ragtime.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo discovers how Minneapolis harnessed the awesome power of the Mighty Mississippi to become a great industrial centre, the Mill City of the nation. And he finds how the city became the artificial limb capital of the world.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie moors by Hampton Court Palace, but disaster strikes when a tree branch smashes a window. His dad joins to help through Hanwell locks.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie returns to where his boating life began, exploring Londons canals on Naughty Lass. He travels through Little Venice and moors in Paddington Basin.

programme.title: Dom Chineas Cornish Workshop
programme.desc: Cornish newcomer Dom Chinea tries to fix a leaky sea pool near Mousehole. He buys a battered old Land Rover and starts a new project crushing waste concrete to fill potholes on his lane.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The second leg of Simon Reeves journey around the Caribbean Sea takes him from the beautiful islands and along the coast of South America. On the beautiful and wealthy island of Barbados he meets the owner of a traditional chattel house.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon begins his journey on the remote Caribbean coast of Nicaragua, travels to the beautiful Honduran island of Roatán and encounters extreme violence on the mainland of Honduras before finishing his adventure on the iconic island of Jamaica.

programme.title: Classic Car Kings
programme.desc: Irv and the team update a 1977 Daimler Sovereign Coupe giving it a slick, modern makeover. However, a disaster in the paint booth puts the project in peril.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul, Mick and Charlie are in Hull for one of their biggest ever collections. Dave takes a test drive in Tesla Model X and Derek is bowled over by a classic vintage motorbike from the 1930s.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team head for restoration in their Bedford Rascal Campervan. They also purchase a true British classic - a TR6 - which is almost too good to touch!

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A super low mileage Renault Dauphine proves irresistible to the Resto team... But its 1959 mechanics ensure some hefty bills.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Theres a surprise waiting for Derek in Hull - a MGSA sports car that once had a tree growing through it. Plus, in North Wales, Alan Holmes is selling his sons Ford Escort RS 1600i.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up a rare Ford Zodiac Farnham Estate, while Dave heads for an isolated tent in the Midlands to collect a Triumph Toledo.

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: The airmen find themselves stuck in the drain in the middle of the village square; Flick tries to frame the Colonel.
